title: BEM-715 autoprocess rule
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['scripts','.github/workflows','governance/protocols','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/agreements/final','governance/agreements/active','governance/handoff','governance/tasks/pending']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 10:50 (UTC+3)'
# 1. Contract/protocol rule: report never stops, Claude mailbox requests require autonomous wake mechanism.
contract=Path('governance/protocols/AUTONOMY_CONTINUITY_CONTRACT_EXTENSION.md')
contract.write_text('# BEM-715 | Autonomy Continuity Contract Extension'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Версия: v1.0-2026-05-21'+sep+'Статус: ACTIVE_RULE'+sep+sep+'## Правило 1. Отчёт не является остановкой'+sep+'Любой отчёт оператору или Claude является промежуточным артефактом. После отчёта агент обязан сразу продолжать следующий шаг, если оператор явно не сказал STOP.'+sep+sep+'## Правило 2. Каждый Claude-mailbox request требует wake/response mechanism'+sep+'После каждого запроса Claude через mailbox должен быть создан или обновлён минимум один автономный механизм получения результата:'+sep+'- primary: ChatGPT Scheduled Task с подтверждением task-card;'+sep+'- fallback: event-driven GitHub workflow на push в Claude mailbox;'+sep+'- дополнительный fallback: разрешённый curator-hourly-report state check.'+sep+sep+'## Правило 3. Оператор не relay'+sep+'Оператор не пересказывает ответы Claude. Система читает repo/mailbox и сама продолжает согласование.'+sep+sep+'## Правило 4. PASS только с доказательством'+sep+'Нельзя писать, что scheduler или autonomy работает, без task-card/run-proof или commit/state proof event-driven autoprocessor.'+sep)
# 2. Event-driven autoprocessor script.
script=Path('scripts/autoprocess_claude_mailbox_response.py')
script.write_text(r'''#!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
from pathlib import Path

SEP='\n'
KYIV=timezone(timedelta(hours=3))
INBOUND=[Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt'),Path('governance/audit_mailbox/external_auditor_to_internal_auditor')]
STATE=Path('governance/state/claude_mailbox_autoprocess_state.json')
ACTIVE=Path('governance/agreements/active')
FINAL=Path('governance/agreements/final')
HANDOFF=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
PENDING=Path('governance/tasks/pending/claude_mailbox_autoprocess_next.md')
REPORT=Path('governance/reports/claude_mailbox_autoprocess_report.md')

def load(path):
    if not path.exists(): return {}
    try: return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: return {}

def detect_decision(text):
    up=text.upper()
    if 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up: return 'CHANGE_REQUIRED'
    if 'BLOCKED' in up: return 'BLOCKED'
    if 'APPROVED' in up or 'DECISION: APPROVE' in up: return 'APPROVED'
    return 'MESSAGE'

def scan():
    items=[]
    for d in INBOUND:
        if not d.exists(): continue
        for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
            if not p.is_file(): continue
            txt=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')
            low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower()
            if 'bem703' in low or 'bem-703' in low or 'bem712' in low or 'bem-712' in low or 'multi-agent strategy' in low or 'multi-agent system protocol' in low:
                items.append({'path':str(p),'decision':detect_decision(txt),'subject':next((x.strip('# ').strip() for x in txt.splitlines() if x.strip()),p.name),'preview':txt[:1200]})
    return items

now=datetime.now(KYIV).strftime('%Y-%m-%d | %H:%M (UTC+3)')
old=load(STATE)
processed=set(old.get('processed_paths',[]))
items=scan()
new=[x for x in items if x['path'] not in processed]
status='no_new_response'
latest=None
if new:
    latest=new[-1]
    status='processed_'+latest['decision'].lower()
    HANDOFF.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    PENDING.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    FINAL.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    ACTIVE.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    if latest['decision']=='APPROVED':
        final=FINAL/'multi_agent_strategy_v2_1_approved_by_claude.md'
        final.write_text('# Multi-Agent Strategy v2.1 | APPROVED BY CLAUDE'+SEP+SEP+'Дата: '+now+SEP+'Source: '+latest['path']+SEP+SEP+'Decision: APPROVED'+SEP+SEP+'Status: ready for GPT final consolidation.'+SEP, encoding='utf-8')
        HANDOFF.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | CLAUDE APPROVED STRATEGY'+SEP+SEP+'Дата: '+now+SEP+'Файл ответа: `'+latest['path']+'`'+SEP+'Финальный артефакт: `'+str(final)+'`'+SEP+'Действие: подготовить согласованный протокол v2.1 и операторский итог.'+SEP, encoding='utf-8')
        PENDING.write_text('# Pending: finalize approved multi-agent strategy v2.1'+SEP+SEP+'Дата: '+now+SEP+'Source: '+latest['path']+SEP+'Action: create final consolidated protocol.'+SEP, encoding='utf-8')
    elif latest['decision']=='CHANGE_REQUIRED':
        HANDOFF.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | CLAUDE CHANGE REQUIRED'+SEP+SEP+'Дата: '+now+SEP+'Файл ответа: `'+latest['path']+'`'+SEP+'Действие: прочитать изменения Claude, обновить draft и отправить следующий раунд без оператора.'+SEP, encoding='utf-8')
        PENDING.write_text('# Pending: apply Claude changes and resubmit'+SEP+SEP+'Дата: '+now+SEP+'Source: '+latest['path']+SEP+'Action: apply changes and create next mailbox round.'+SEP, encoding='utf-8')
    elif latest['decision']=='BLOCKED':
        HANDOFF.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | CLAUDE BLOCKED'+SEP+SEP+'Дата: '+now+SEP+'Файл ответа: `'+latest['path']+'`'+SEP+'Действие: проанализировать blocker и подготовить unblock plan.'+SEP, encoding='utf-8')
        PENDING.write_text('# Pending: resolve Claude blocker'+SEP+SEP+'Дата: '+now+SEP+'Source: '+latest['path']+SEP+'Action: create unblock plan.'+SEP, encoding='utf-8')
    else:
        HANDOFF.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | CLAUDE MESSAGE RECEIVED'+SEP+SEP+'Дата: '+now+SEP+'Файл ответа: `'+latest['path']+'`'+SEP+'Действие: классифицировать сообщение Claude.'+SEP, encoding='utf-8')
        PENDING.write_text('# Pending: classify Claude message'+SEP+SEP+'Дата: '+now+SEP+'Source: '+latest['path']+SEP, encoding='utf-8')
STATE.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
STATE.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'claude_mailbox_autoprocess_state.v1','status':status,'checked_at':now,'items':items,'new_items':new,'processed_paths':sorted(set(list(processed)+[x['path'] for x in new])),'operator_role':'none','latest':latest},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+SEP, encoding='utf-8')
REPORT.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
REPORT.write_text('# Claude Mailbox Autoprocess Report'+SEP+SEP+'Дата: '+now+SEP+'Status: '+status+SEP+'New items: '+str(len(new))+SEP+'Operator role: none'+SEP, encoding='utf-8')
print(json.dumps({'status':status,'new_items':len(new),'operator_role':'none'},ensure_ascii=False))
''')
# 3. Workflow: event-driven, no schedule.
wf=Path('.github/workflows/claude-mailbox-autoprocess.yml')
wf.write_text('''name: Claude Mailbox Autoprocess

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/**'
      - 'governance/audit_mailbox/external_auditor_to_internal_auditor/**'
      - 'scripts/autoprocess_claude_mailbox_response.py'
      - '.github/workflows/claude-mailbox-autoprocess.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: claude-mailbox-autoprocess
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  autoprocess:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Syntax check
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/autoprocess_claude_mailbox_response.py
      - name: Autoprocess Claude mailbox
        run: python3 scripts/autoprocess_claude_mailbox_response.py
      - name: Commit autoprocess state
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/state/claude_mailbox_autoprocess_state.json governance/reports/claude_mailbox_autoprocess_report.md governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md governance/tasks/pending/claude_mailbox_autoprocess_next.md governance/agreements/final/multi_agent_strategy_v2_1_approved_by_claude.md
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || git commit -m "BEM-715 claude mailbox autoprocess state"
          git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
          git push || true
''')
# 4. State/report.
checks=[
 {'name':'contract_extension_exists','pass':contract.exists(),'evidence':str(contract)},
 {'name':'autoprocess_script_exists','pass':script.exists(),'evidence':str(script)},
 {'name':'workflow_exists','pass':wf.exists(),'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'workflow_has_no_schedule','pass':'schedule:' not in wf.read_text(errors='ignore'),'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'workflow_push_mailbox_paths','pass':'governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/**' in wf.read_text(errors='ignore'),'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'operator_role_none','pass':'operator_role' in script.read_text(errors='ignore') and 'none' in script.read_text(errors='ignore'),'evidence':str(script)},
]
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='event_driven_autoprocess_installed' if not failed else 'failed'
blocker=None if not failed else {'code':'EVENT_DRIVEN_AUTOPROCESS_INSTALL_FAILED','failed':failed}
state={'schema_version':'contract_rule_and_event_driven_claude_autoprocess.v1','bem':'BEM-715','status':status,'checks':checks,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem715_contract_rule_and_event_driven_claude_autoprocess.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem715_contract_rule_and_event_driven_claude_autoprocess.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-715 | Contract Rule And Event Driven Claude Autoprocess | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Installed event-driven mailbox autoprocessor. Reports do not stop work. Operator is not relay.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem715_contract_rule_and_event_driven_claude_autoprocess','status':status,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem715_contract_rule_and_event_driven_claude_autoprocess.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-715 '+status+': event-driven Claude mailbox autoprocessor installed.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(contract),str(script),str(wf),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Added autonomy continuity contract extension and installed event-driven Claude mailbox autoprocess workflow on mailbox push without schedule and without operator relay')
"""
No issue comments.
